file_insights.changes: Reordered imports (crate::paths moved before app module); reformatted long crossterm imports; fixed line wrapping in closure expressions
file_insights.impact: Import ordering now matches Rust convention (local imports after external); improves readability

file_insights.impact: Action popup rendering is scaffolded but not yet wired; allows code to exist without clippy warnings

file_insights.changes: Aligned inline comments in status_color match; reformatted Style chains; removed unused fs::write wrapping; simplified line construction

patterns_discovered.pattern: Dead code scaffolding for WIP features
patterns_discovered.evidence: #[allow(dead_code)] applied to: LogLine, is_at_wip_limit(), total_cards(), push_throughput(), render_action_popup(), render_empty_popup(), centered_rect(), detail_line_count()
patterns_discovered.implication: These are intentionally defined but unused—likely part of Wave 6+ kanban UI enhancements (WIP limits, throughput metrics, action popups)

patterns_discovered.pattern: Strict line-length enforcement (rustfmt column limit ~100 chars)
patterns_discovered.evidence: Multi-line imports, closure expressions, and assertions reformatted to break at column boundaries
patterns_discovered.implication: Codebase enforces tight formatting; all long lines must be wrapped, alignment must be consistent

patterns_discovered.evidence: crate:: imports moved before internal module declarations (use crate::paths; before use app::App;)
patterns_discovered.implication: Follows Rust style guide: external crates → local crates → modules

patterns_discovered.evidence: Removed COLUMN_STATES constant import and Rect type from snapshot_tests
patterns_discovered.implication: Dead imports detected by clippy; test refactoring eliminated need for these

gotchas_discovered.issue: Multiple UI functions marked dead_code but scaffold real features
gotchas_discovered.cause: WIP limit and action popup features planned but not yet integrated into event handling
gotchas_discovered.impact: Suppressions are correct but may accumulate if features languish—schedule integration soon
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document in code comments which wave/spec each dead function targets (e.g., // Wave 6, spec 029)

gotchas_discovered.issue: Rustfmt line-breaking is stricter than rustfmt defaults
gotchas_discovered.cause: Project likely has custom rustfmt.toml config with low max_width or specific comment alignment rules
gotchas_discovered.impact: Simple refactors can trigger formatting diffs; requires multiple passes to fully comply
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Run `cargo fmt` before every commit; check rustfmt.toml in project root

gotchas_discovered.issue: Status color function comment alignment changed
gotchas_discovered.cause: Formatter adjusted comment indentation in match arms (single vs double space)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Visual style now consistent across all match arms
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: None—this is expected behavior; commit as-is
